methodology: Source code analysis for duplicate patterns, page counts per section

duplicate_risk_areas.detail: Phase 32 identified 125 thin guides with near-zero impressions. Likely templated content with number-swapping.
duplicate_risk_areas.action: Audit for duplicate patterns. Noindex low-value guides.

duplicate_risk_areas.detail: Pre-calculated scenarios (e.g., 'small-emergency-loan-5000-15-percent'). May be doorway-like if too many for same calculator.
duplicate_risk_areas.action: Verify each scenario has unique value. Consolidate overly similar scenarios.

duplicate_risk_areas.detail: Comparison pages (e.g., rent-vs-buy). Check for templated content.
duplicate_risk_areas.action: Ensure each comparison has unique analysis and actionable insights.

duplicate_risk_areas.detail: 4 scenarios found. Each has different amounts/rates/terms — legitimate variation.
duplicate_risk_areas.action: OK for now. Cap at reasonable number.

duplicate_risk_areas.detail: Currency/geo variants of calculators. May be near-duplicate content.
duplicate_risk_areas.action: Use hreflang tags correctly. Ensure each variant has localized content.

immediate_actions: No new page creation during Phase 34
Audit blog posts for thin/duplicate content
Flag any doorway-like scenario pages for consolidation
note: Full uniqueness audit requires crawling all published pages. This is a source-code-level audit.
